patch.value: MCP pm_list defaults to compact projection for agents

pm_list MCP tool returned 79k chars for 4 in-progress items because projection defaulted to full (includes bodies, comments, all files). Now defaults to compact when no projection flag is set. Agents can opt out with options.compact=false or options.includeBody=true.
MCP pm_list default returns compact rows; description explains compact/brief/fields/limit options; opt-in to full output still available.
